title: Director Plan Result
description: Planner-side receipt emitted when Director successfully produces a bounded materialization plan. Emitted as director-plan-result.json.

contract_version.description: Optional schema version label for emitters.

status.description: Current success-state emitted when the planner has produced a bounded intake envelope for workspace materialization.

repo.description: Git URL or local repository path that the plan targets.

intake_path.description: Path to the generated director_intake_execution_contract JSON artifact.
